The team changes plan on-page before dawn to an emergency church-lot chain-preservation workflow with witness logging and distributed custody.
finding_results.summary: On-page causality now includes an active consequence from the break-in that forces immediate operational change before dawn.

finding_results.notes: Removed the clean ethical-thesis closure and replaced it with unresolved exposure: Lena is under active patrol attention, implicated by a bribery witness text, and still physically handling her father's incriminating signature while threat remains live.
finding_results.summary: The ending now stays morally contaminated and materially precarious, without self-exonerating reassurance.
